meta.description: A database table definition including columns, indexes, constraints and access patterns

schema.description: Schema or namespace, e.g. public, dbo, crs

database.description: Database name or engine, e.g. crsprd, landonline

primaryKey.description: Column name(s) that form the primary key

access.description: Typical access pattern from application code

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_acbebdc2_97c3_4b98_aed7_3f54cd7fca55" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "name" TEXT,
    "schema" TEXT,
    "database" TEXT,
    "engine" TEXT,
    "description" TEXT,
    "primary_key" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "audited" BOOLEAN,
    "row_count" INTEGER,
    "access" TEXT,
    "notes" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_acbebdc2_97c3_4b98_aed7_3f54cd7fca55" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_acbebdc297c34b98_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
